scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; ua="${npm_config_user_agent:-}"; execpath="${npm_execpath:-}"; ok=0; case "$ua" in pnpm/*|pnpm) ok=1 ;; esac; case "$execpath" in *pnpm*) ok=1 ;; esac; if [ "$ok" -ne 1 ]; then echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1; fi'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
